name: Fujifilm Instax Square SQ40 Instant Film Camera
description: Taking inspiration from the cameras of yesteryear, the FUJIFILM INSTAX SQUARE SQ40 Instant Film Camera has a retro look while producing the same 2.4 x 2.4" square prints we've come to love.

features.Key Features:: Accepts INSTAX SQUARE Film | Fully Automatic Operation | Retro-Inspired Design | Built-In Selfie Mirror in Front | Fujinon 65.75mm f/12.6 Lens | Selfie Mode Minimum Focus: 11.8"
features.What's In The Bo: FUJIFILM INSTAX SQUARE SQ40 Instant Film Camera (Black) | 2 x CR2 Battery | Strap
